thread.title: India’s Global Appeal Grows: EAM Jaishankar Highlights Nation’s Rising Influence
thread.title_full: India’s Global Appeal Grows: EAM Jaishankar Highlights Nation’s Rising Influence

author: @TheDailyGuardian
title: India’s Global Appeal Grows: EAM Jaishankar Highlights Nation’s Rising Influence
text:
[+](javascipt:void(0);)
External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar emphasized India’s growing global respect during his virtual address at the India Foundation’s Ideas Conclave on “Building Brand Bharat.” He stated that nations worldwide now see value in India’s endeavors across various domains.
Reflecting on his recent participation at the CARICOM Summit in Guyana with Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Jaishankar noted the admiration India received for its advancements in:
Jaishankar highlighted India’s transformation over the last decade, stating, “Indians are now recognized as tech innovators, and we’ve demonstrated resilience on key global issues like trade, nuclear policies, and territorial integrity.”
Jaishankar also celebrated the success of the recent Lok Sabha elections, calling it the largest democratic exercise globally, showcasing India’s robust political framework and flawless execution.
Acknowledging India’s digital embrace, Jaishankar said, “Our achievements in digital technologies are among the most impactful, advancing Brand Bharat globally.” He also lauded India’s ability to engage with the world on its terms, crafting a unique lexicon rooted in its rich civilization.
Jaishankar’s comments come after accompanying PM Modi on his three-nation tour of Nigeria, Brazil, and Guyana. Highlights included:
With 31 bilateral meetings and pivotal discussions, the visit marked a new milestone in India’s global engagement.
Jaishankar shared images from the conclave on platform X, emphasizing the importance of Brand Bharat, stating it reflects “authenticity, ambition, and self-reliance.” India’s global journey continues to inspire and expand its influence.
